arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal team selection provides biggest Kieran Tierney Celtic clue yet
arts.sum: But manager Mikel Arteta recently claimed Tierney still had a big part to play with the Premier League giants as he offered little in the way of a nod to which way the left-back might go. Tierney was given a run out against Crystal Palace in the Carabao Cup recently before he was subbed off and that’s when Arteta initially hinted at a possible stay.

arts.ttl: Who will win Rangers vs Celtic? Our writers deliver their predictions for New Year curtain raiser at Ibrox
arts.sum: The Premiership champions travel across Glasgow looking to go 17 points clear of their bitter rivals at the top of the table

arts.ttl: Rangers’ Jack Butland hospitalised after ‘significant’ internal bleeding in leg
arts.sum: Goalkeeper will miss match against Celtic at Ibrox Butland left hospital on New Year’s Day and will recover The Rangers goalkeeper Jack Butland spent Tuesday night in hospital after what he has described as “significant” internal bleeding in a leg. Butland will sit out Thursday’s Old Firm clash at Ibrox, with the longer-term availability of the former England player unclear. Butland left hospital on New Year’s Day. A statement from his club said: “Rangers can confirm goalkeeper Jack Butland will miss tomorrow’s Old Firm match with Celtic. The goalkeeper suffered an internal bleed in his leg which required hospital treatment but he has since been released and is recovering. Everyone at Rangers wishes Jack a speedy recovery.” No timescale is being placed on Butland’s return. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Celtic defender set for KV Mechelen loan spell
arts.sum: According to Record Sport, KV Mechelen are set to bring Stephen Welsh in on loan. The Celtic defender is expected to be the sides first January signing as they look…

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' all-time Celtic record vs Rangers including historic Ibrox Glasgow Derby demolition
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has 16 Celtic wins over Rangers in Glasgow Derby With Celtic set to face Rangers tomorrow afternoon in the first Glasgow Derby clash of 2025, 67 Hail Hail takes a look back at the historic fixture under Brendan Rodgers.

arts.ttl: Jack Butland ruled out of Old Firm derby after being treated in hospital for internal bleed
arts.sum: The 31-year England international is recovering at home after suffering an internal bleed in his leg

arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn set for Celtic contract talks as champions prepare big deal for red-hot winger – transfer latest
arts.sum: Kuhn has been a standout for the Hoops this season and has scored a stunning 14 goals and 11 assists in all competitions, it has led to interest from across Europe and England

arts.ttl: Rangers' season not over says Clement as Rodgers vows Celtic won't 'soften up'
arts.sum: Philippe Clement insists Rangers' season is not over ahead of Thursday's Old Firm clash, while Brendan Rodgers has vowed Celtic will not "soften up" despite their 14-point lead in the Scottish Premiership.

arts.ttl: Clement has to win hearts and minds at Rangers. Beating Celtic would help
arts.sum: Manager is yet to win an Old Firm match and success would help him to show he is making some progress Philippe Clement can only hope the law of averages is due to swing in his favour. If not, the sense of an elongated, unsatisfactory conclusion to his spell as the manager of Rangers will have intensified by Thursday evening. Brendan Rodgers has tasted defeat in only one of 20 Old Firm matches. Celtic’s manager has presided over 16 wins in that run. Clement would be forgiven trepidation, then, as Rangers prepare to host their oldest foes. The Belgian is yet to defeat Celtic, having faced them half a dozen times. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Butland to miss Celtic clash after being admitted to hospital
arts.sum: Rangers goalkeeper Jack Butland will miss Thursday's match against Celtic after being admitted to hospital.
